items.name_en: ✈️Supports chip sensing✈️⭐️Accurate development⭐️Original hardware✈️【Onthego mini handbag】M45653 Small shopping bag. This Onthego mini shopping bag showcases the Monogram pattern to the fullest, with large letters embossed on soft grained calfskin. Its ample interior can accommodate a laptop and other office supplies, and the long and short handles allow for hand or shoulder carrying.

items.name_cn:
✈️Top-tier Original✨💞💞 【BAGATELLE Handbag】 m46301 46002 Pink (Silk Screen)
This Bagatelle handbag is crafted from Monogram Empreinte grained leather, featuring a light and elegant large embossed pattern that highlights the curved silhouette. Cleverly using a detachable and adjustable shoulder strap, you can switch between single shoulder, elbow carry, and crossbody at will.
Size: 24 x 18 x 7 cm MXP-7517009

items.name_cn:
✨【LV X TM SPEEDY BANDOULIÈRE 25】M13805 M13085
This Speedy Bandoulière 25 gx tri-color bag renders the classic Monogram pattern in bright colors inspired by Japanese artist Takashi Murakami, showcasing the dynamic charm of the Louis Vuitton x Takashi Murakami collaboration series together with the bow-shaped key pouch. Calfskin creates the Toron handle and a detachable, adjustable shoulder strap. The dazzling lock and corners draw inspiration from the brand's luggage elements.
Size: 25 x 19 x 15 cm (Length x Height x Width)

items.name_en: ✨CELINE CABAS TRIOMPHE🛍 Canvas Small Vertical Handbag 191542# 'Brown' Triumph Shopping Bag, super suitable for this autumn and winter. Compared to the old/new vintage, the Triumphal Arch pattern is more 3D, looking more stylish. Classic brown, very retro! 65% coated canvas, 35% calfskin, 100% cotton lining. Interior zip pocket, adjustable and detachable leather shoulder strap! Size: 28*33*8cm
